ddls:
CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strain */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the strain (e.g., indica, sativa, hybrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strain */,
  "thc_percentage" REAL /* THC content percentage of the strain */,
  "cbd_percentage" REAL /* CBD content percentage of the strain */,
  "yield" TEXT /* Yield of the strain (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "flowering_time" TEXT /* Flowering time of the strain (e.g., 6-8 weeks) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of growing the strain (e.g., Easy, Moderate, Difficult) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the strain (e.g., Afghanistan, Hawaii) */,
  "seed_source" TEXT /* Source of the seeds (e.g., Company A, Company B) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavors" (
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain the flavor belongs to */,
  "flavor_name" TEXT /* Name of the flavor (e.g., earthy, chemical, pine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavors_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain the effect belongs to */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect (e.g., relaxed, happy, euphoric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effects_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain the benefit belongs to */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit (e.g., depression, pain, stress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_benefits_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the user has verified their purchase of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., grower, dispensary owner, reviewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavor_reviews" (
  "flavor_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor review */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the flavor review */,
  "flavor_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the flavor (out of 5) */,
  "flavor_text" TEXT /* Text of the flavor review */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the flavor review was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the flavor review was last updated */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the user has verified their purchase of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_reviews_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effect_reviews" (
  "effect_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect review */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the effect review */,
  "effect_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the effect (out of 5) */,
  "effect_text" TEXT /* Text of the effect review */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date and time when the effect review was created */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the effect review was last updated */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the user has verified their purchase of the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_reviews_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strain the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., THC, CBD, yield) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)
